title: Cillian Murphy Talks About Peaky Blinders Movie
summary: Cillian Murphy is an actor who plays Tommy Shelby in Peaky Blinders, a TV show about gangsters in Birmingham. He is now in a new movie called Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man. He says it is humbling to see how much fans love the show. The fans helped make the show popular without much promotion. The movie comes out four years after the TV show ended. In the movie, Tommy Shelby is alone in a big house during World War Two, and he has to face his past. New actors like Barry Keoghan join the movie. The creator, Steven Knight, says the cast is great and fans are loyal. The movie will be in cinemas for two weeks so fans can watch it together before it goes on Netflix.

background_read: Peaky Blinders is a popular TV show from the BBC that started in 2013. It is about a gangster family in Birmingham, England, after World War One. The main character is Tommy Shelby, played by Cillian Murphy. The show has many fans who love the story and characters. After six seasons, the show ended, but now there is a new movie. Movies are longer stories shown in cinemas, and this one continues Tommy's story during World War Two. Fans can watch it together in cinemas before it comes out on Netflix, a streaming service where you can watch shows online.
Article_Structure: WHO: Cillian Murphy, Steven Knight, and fans of Peaky Blinders
WHAT: A new movie called Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man is released
WHERE: The movie is set in Birmingham and during World War Two, and will be in cinemas
WHY: To continue the story for fans and let them watch it together in person

perspectives.description: Cillian Murphy feels humbled by fan support and sees the movie as a reward for fans.
Steven Knight praises the cast and fans, wanting the movie in cinemas for shared experiences.
